title: Using formula column values in dashboard widget app
excerpt: Hello, I’m currently working on a dashboard widget based app for the marketplace and I’m struggling to get values from formula columns.  Does anyone have experience with this?

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’m currently working on a dashboard widget based app for the marketplace and I’m struggling to get values from formula columns. Does anyone have experience with this?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @liambailey,

If you are trying to get the result of a formula column via API, that can not be done as of today. The result gets calculated on the client side.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Liam,

You can do it with a 3rd party app, ie. the Advanced Formula Booster which breaks free of the formula column to create formulas. In the Advanced Formula Booster, any type of field can be the target of your calculations. Consequently you can see the values you calculate in any widget.
